basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has officially announced the Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings under Advertisement No. SPON/10456/Advt0264. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIT Gandhinagar website. Candidates up to 50 years of age holding a B.Sc., B.Tech., or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology with at least 60% marks or 7 CGPA (along with the required Class 10 and 12 qualifications) can submit their online applications on or before 18 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. / B.Tech / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology with at least 60% marks or 7 CGPA (on a scale of 10), 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Technical Assistant: B.Sc. / B.Tech / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology with at least 60% marks or 7 CGPA (on a scale of 10). 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Technical Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Gandhinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. IIT Gandhinagar Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT Gandhinagar Technical Assistant posts is 18-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. /B.Tech or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology with at least 60% marks or 7 CGPA. Additionally, 55% or equivalent grade is required in class 10th and 12th.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Assistant post is 50 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Technical Assistant position will receive a salary of Rs. 35100 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Technical Assistant post at IIT Gandhinagar. These positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for the IIT Gandhinagar Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIT Gandhinagar Technical Assistant recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Technical Assistant position at IIT Gandhinagar is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the Advertisement Number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Technical Assistants at IIT Gandhinagar is SPON/10456/Advt0264.
